untranslatable_reason: This signal requires multi-dimensional cross-sectional ranking (percentile-based selection within size/momentum groups and NYSE median-cap stratification) and custom portfolio construction logic that cannot be expressed using only single-indicator point-in-time conditions. The strategy requires: (1) ranking entire stock universe by 12-month returns excluding most recent month, (2) stratifying by NYSE median market cap, (3) creating six intersection portfolios, and (4) equal-weight rebalancing. These are portfolio-construction and weighting rules, not price-action entry/exit signals translatable to the allowed indicator operators.
translation_notes: This is a classic Fama-French style factor model (likely the Jegadeesh & Titman momentum factor) that operates at the portfolio/asset-class level rather than single-instrument level. It requires a custom backtest engine with ranking, stratification, and portfolio construction capabilities beyond the scope of single-indicator rule conditions. Recommend implementing as a dedicated multi-asset portfolio strategy module rather than as individual entry/exit rules.
